ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: 64% potatoes, 29% sunflower oil, 7% spice mixture (sugar, salt, onion powder, whey powder (milk), milk sugar (milk), milk powder (milk), flavor enhancer (e621), parsley, yeast extract, acid (malic acid), aroma, spice extract),
